raw_consumer_statement:
There were unauthorized charges to my Home Depot Credit card from XX/XX/XXXX to XX/XX/XXXX. 
I live in XXXX XXXX XXXX and I was out of the country from XX/XX/XXXX till XX/XX/XXXX and i returned to XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXXXX/XX/XXXX. 

No one has access to my Home Depot Credit card. 

The unauthorized charges were made to purchase gift cards as follows : XXXX - XXXX XXXX XXXX  {$110.00} XXXX Home Depot XXXX XXXX XXXX {$1300.00} XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX {$1200.00} XXXXHome Depot XXXX XXXX XXXX {$1600.00} XXXX-Home Depot XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX {$1400.00} XXXX reached out to HD and reported the fraud transaction XXXX 
Home Depot credit services determined that i was responsible for the charges because the physical credit card was in my house.Credit services. I provided several evidence that i was out of the country
